articles.author: Nicole Tung
articles.title: Photos: How overfishing in Southeast Asia is an ecological and human crisis - NPR
articles.description: A rare look at one of the world's most critical and understudied environmental crises. Southeast Asia produces more than half of the world's fish, yet its waters are among the most depleted and contested.
articles.content: "We were fighting over who had caught more fish, and then I saw my crewmate pushed overboard by the captain," Akbar Fitrian, 29, an Indonesian crewmember says as he recounts an incident aboard a Chin… [+11727 chars]
